name: 100% Wheat Bread - 1 1/2 Lb. Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Whole Wheat Flour Plus 2 tbsp (11.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the bread pan in the order listed, or reverse if your machine's manual requires dry ingredients first and liquids last.
2. Select Basic Wheat Cycle on Light Setting (or equivalent setting for your machine).
3. Push Start button.
Serves 12-14
Nutrient Analysis per Serving:
Calories: 129
Carbohydrates: 23
Protein: 5
Fat: 2
Fiber: 3
